arts.ttl: Preview: Sheffield Wednesday vs. Sheffield United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Sheffield Wednesday and Sheffield United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United vs Sheffield Wednesday – The Steel City Derby Preview
arts.sum: Promotion chasers Sheffield United travel across the Steel City to take on play-off hopefuls Sheffield Wednesday. The two teams come into derby day with contrasting emotions. United conceded a 90th minute equaliser at home against Bristol City in midweek, in a game where they were largely outplayed.
